items.sigma_rule:
title: SENTINEL APEX — How a Webmail Log File Became a Root-Level Backdoor
id: 3e97f5d9-ca82-52cd-ac31-08a9454ceb6d
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to How a Webmail Log File Became a Root-Level Backdoor (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: LOW | Class: PHISHING
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/How a Webmail Log File Became a Root-Level Backdoor
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/06/01
modified: 2026/06/01
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: network_connection
    product: generic
detection:
    selection_email:
        EventID: 28
        TargetFilename|contains:
            - '.hta'
            - '.lnk'
            - '.iso'
            - '.vhd'
            - '.docm'
    selection_network:
        DestinationHostname|endswith:
            - '.xyz'
            - '.top'
            - '.pw'
            - '.cc'
        DestinationPort: 443
    condition: selection_email or selection_network
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate file downloads from CDNs
    - Business email with ISO attachments
level: low
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX How a Webmail Log File Became a Root-Level Backdoor Exploitation Attempt - PHISHING"; flow:established,to_server; content:".hta"; nocase; http.uri; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:2919438; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-06-01, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)
items.apex_ai_summary: [P4] Remote Code Execution - low severity (Risk 1.6/10). MITRE ATT&CK mapped: T1059, T1190.001, T1098, T1071 (5 techniques). 15 indicators detected - upgrade to Pro for full IOC access. Actor attribution: CDB-UNATTR-APT. AI confidence: LOW (38%) - limited source data available.

author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/06/01
modified: 2026/06/01
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: network_connection
    product: generic
detection:
    selection:
        EventID:
            - 4625
            - 4648
            - 4728
        LogonType: 3

    - Service account activity
level: low
items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — Wordfence Intelligence Weekly WordPress Vulnerability Report (May 11, 2026 to May 17, 2026) — Anomalous Activity Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-06-01T17:27:16Z
let lookback = 1d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where EventID in (4625, 4648, 4728, 4740, 4776)
| summarize FailureCount = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName)
    by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where FailureCount > 10 or DistinctTargets > 5
| extend Severity = "MEDIUM", CVE = "Wordfence Intelligence Weekly WordPress Vulnerability Report (May 11, 2026 to May 17, 2026)", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by TimeGenerated desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX Wordfence Intelligence Weekly WordPress Vulnerability Report (May 11, 2026 to May 17, 2026) Exploitation Attempt - GENERIC"; flow:established,to_server; content:"|90 90 90 90|"; rawbytes; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:3074237; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-06-01, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)

title: SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-45266 Nextcloud Unauthorized force-mute from missing permission check w
id: f2b0f4bb-759e-54b0-bd08-6b4c74280bd7
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to CVE-2026-45266 (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: LOW | Class: RCE
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-45266
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/06/01
modified: 2026/06/01
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: process_creation
    product: generic
detection:
    selection_process:
        CommandLine|contains:
            - 'cmd.exe /c'
            - 'powershell -enc'
            - '/bin/sh -c'
            - 'wget http'
            - 'curl http'
    selection_webshell:
        Image|endswith:
            - '\cmd.exe'
            - '\powershell.exe'
            - '/bash'
            - '/sh'
        ParentImage|contains:
            - 'w3wp.exe'
            - 'httpd'
            - 'nginx'
            - 'apache2'
            - 'tomcat'
    condition: selection_process or selection_webshell
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative scripts executing via web server
    - Deployment automation tools
level: low
items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-45266 Remote Code Execution Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-06-01T17:27:16Z
// Deploy to: Microsoft Sentinel / Defender XDR
let lookback = 1d;
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(lookback)
| where (InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("w3wp.exe", "httpd.exe", "nginx.exe", "tomcat.exe", "java.exe")
    and FileName in~ ("cmd.exe", "powershell.exe", "bash", "sh", "python.exe", "python3"))
    or (ProcessCommandLine has_any ("wget http", "curl http", "certutil -urlcache", "bitsadmin /transfer"))
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, FileName, ProcessCommandLine,
          InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine
| where not(ProcessCommandLine has_any ("update", "install", "backup", "deploy"))  // filter known-good
| extend Severity = "HIGH", CVE = "CVE-2026-45266", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by Timestamp desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX CVE-2026-45266 Exploitation Attempt - RCE"; flow:established,to_server; content:"/bin/sh"; nocase; content:"cmd.exe"; nocase; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:1975413; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-06-01, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)

items.sigma_rule:
title: SENTINEL APEX — Critical Magento Cache Plugin Vulnerability Enables Remote Code Execution Attack
id: 59a2e4b0-4056-5b2a-9405-4719fbde8153
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to Critical Magento Cache Plugin Vulnerability Enables Remote Code Execution Attacks (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: LOW | Class: RCE
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/Critical Magento Cache Plugin Vulnerability Enables Remote Code Execution Attacks
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/06/01
modified: 2026/06/01
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: process_creation
    product: generic
detection:
    selection_process:
        CommandLine|contains:
            - 'cmd.exe /c'
            - 'powershell -enc'
            - '/bin/sh -c'
            - 'wget http'
            - 'curl http'
    selection_webshell:
        Image|endswith:
            - '\cmd.exe'
            - '\powershell.exe'
            - '/bash'
            - '/sh'
        ParentImage|contains:
            - 'w3wp.exe'
            - 'httpd'
            - 'nginx'
            - 'apache2'
            - 'tomcat'
    condition: selection_process or selection_webshell
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative scripts executing via web server
    - Deployment automation tools
level: low
items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — Critical Magento Cache Plugin Vulnerability Enables Remote Code Execution Attacks Remote Code Execution Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-06-01T17:27:16Z
// Deploy to: Microsoft Sentinel / Defender XDR
let lookback = 1d;
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(lookback)
| where (InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("w3wp.exe", "httpd.exe", "nginx.exe", "tomcat.exe", "java.exe")
    and FileName in~ ("cmd.exe", "powershell.exe", "bash", "sh", "python.exe", "python3"))
    or (ProcessCommandLine has_any ("wget http", "curl http", "certutil -urlcache", "bitsadmin /transfer"))
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, FileName, ProcessCommandLine,
          InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine
| where not(ProcessCommandLine has_any ("update", "install", "backup", "deploy"))  // filter known-good
| extend Severity = "HIGH", CVE = "Critical Magento Cache Plugin Vulnerability Enables Remote Code Execution Attacks", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by Timestamp desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX Critical Magento Cache Plugin Vulnerability Enables Remote Code Execution Attacks Exploitation Attempt - RCE"; flow:established,to_server; content:"/bin/sh"; nocase; content:"cmd.exe"; nocase; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:2077331; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-06-01, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)
